name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-24
title: tdd-step.py sync_deployed_skills is undocumented in spec
description: tdd-step.py defines and invokes sync_deployed_skills (lines 167-192, called from _post_test_green_hooks line 248). On every test-green transition it copies SKILL.md from feature dirs to .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md. This duplicates the responsibility declared by build-contract.json (per spec Inv 9, skills are managed via build-contract.json copy-file entries). Either this is dead/redundant code that should be removed (build-contract handles it), or it is a real side effect that must be added to spec invariants and contract.md's 'writes'. Currently no spec invariant mentions it and it is invisible to the contract.
